title: Sarah Forgot Her Password
ticket: Sarah cannot sign in and needs urgent access.
clue: Account recovery starts with identity verification.
tooltip: Reset the password safely and test sign-in.
careerConnection: Password reset is one of the most common support calls.

actionTask.instructions: Reset a test password and confirm successful sign-in.
actionTask.expectedResult: The test user can sign in with the new password.
actionTask.screenshotExample: Accounts settings showing the target account.

repeatTask: Repeat reset flow with fewer hints.
breakFixTask: Set a wrong temporary password, then correct it.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without help?
ticketCompletion: Sarah signs in successfully and securely.
